name: containerlab-web
description: Standalone browser runtime for containerlab built on @srl-labs/clab-ui.

scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k -n server,vite "tsx watch server/cli.ts" "sh -c 'until curl -sSf http://localhost:${PORT:-3000}/api/config >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; vite --config vite.config.ts --force'"
scripts.dev:local: node scripts/check-local-clab-ui.mjs && NODE_ENV=development CLAB_UI_SOURCE=local concurrently -k -n server,vite "tsx watch --tsconfig tsconfig.server.local-ui.runtime.json server/cli.ts" "sh -c 'until curl -sSf http://localhost:${PORT:-3000}/api/config >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; vite --config vite.config.ts --force'"
scripts.build: vite build --config vite.config.ts && npm run build:server
scripts.build:desktop:runtime: npm run build:desktop:main && npm run build:desktop:preload
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build:desktop:runtime
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit
scripts.typecheck:local-ui: node scripts/check-local-clab-ui.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.local-ui.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.local-ui.json --noEmit
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build:desktop:runtime && NODE_ENV=development concurrently -k -n vite,electron "vite --config vite.config.ts --force" "sh -c 'until curl -sSf ${VITE_DEV_URL:-http://localhost:5173} >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 0.2; done; electron dist/electron/main.cjs'"
